label: Transfer & Bridge
description: Send tokens on the same chain or bridge cross-chain. Shows gas estimate and bridge fee before submission.

0.5.note: stale known-issue cleared — getMockPrice and chainPortfolios already flow through useDeFiData() context, no direct mock imports in widget.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Fixed: (1) added isLoading={false} placeholder to FormWidget for future real-data wiring, (2) added empty state guard for null connectedWallet, (3) removed duplicate isFastest badge branch (dead code). 0.5 stale known-issue cleared — getMockPrice and chainPortfolios already flow through useDeFiData() context, no direct mock imports in widget.

1.1.note: Data exclusively from useDeFiData() hook — pass. 1.2: defi-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() at line 188 — pass. 1.3: Org filter: hasDefiDesk derived from globalScope.organizationIds; zeros token balances and returns empty bridge routes when org lacks DeFi access — pass. 1.4: Client filter N/A — context filters at org level, no sub-client cascade for DeFi. 1.5: Strategy filter: tradeHistory filters by scopeStrategyIds (line 211); transfer widget itself is action-only, not data-display, so N/A for strategy scoping. 1.6: Empty scope arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk returns true when organizationIds.length === 0) — pass. 1.7: Reference data (DEFI_CHAINS, DEFI_TOKENS, GAS_TOKEN_MIN_THRESHOLDS) in lib/config/services/defi.config — pass. getMockPrice and MOCK_CHAIN_PORTFOLIOS are mock fixtures exposed via context, not imported directly by the widget — acceptable under current mock-data architecture.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch: Send/Bridge execution should be disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but does not consume scope.mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: Send/Bridge buttons disabled; wallet and chain info still displayed.

3.6.note: useGasEstimate hook ticks every 5s (DEFI_GAS_TICK_MS) via setInterval; cleans up on unmount. Production swap to WS subscription or REST poll against gas oracle planned — widget API unchanged.

4.1.note: Send/Bridge buttons, mode toggle, route selection, and chain/token selects are functional.

5.1.note: Target strategies: YIELD_ROTATION_LENDING (send mode for fund movement), ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION (bridge mode for cross-chain arb), CARRY_STAKED_BASIS (bridge to Hyperliquid margin). Operations: TRANSFER (send), TRANSFER+SOR_CROSS_CHAIN (bridge).

l5.notes: 5.2-5.6: Human walkthrough required for bridge route verification.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file.

7.3.note: 418 lines — within 500-line limit but approaching threshold. Consider splitting bridge route section.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: routes useMemo deps stable [getBridgeRoutes, token, amountNum, fromChain, toChain]. useEffect deps stable [routes].

l7.notes: 7.3 advisory: 418 lines approaches 500 limit. No action required yet.

8.1.note: text-[9px] at lines 351, 357 migrated to text-nano; text-[10px] at lines 152, 164, 293, 305, 322, 368, 371 migrated to text-micro. text-[11px] at line 107 remains — no 11px token in scale (nearest are text-nano 9px and text-xs 12px); product decision required.

8.3.note: Button, Input, Select, Badge, FormWidget from components/ui/* and shared.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Route selection uses native <button> with accessible text. Human: keyboard pass required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Transfer+Bridge combines two distinct operations in one widget — appropriate given DeFi workflow where bridge and send are closely related.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-transfer.ts (bridge routes via context getBridgeRoutes); lib/config/services/defi.config.ts CHAIN_GAS_BASELINE + DEFI_GAS_UNITS (gas quote seeds via useGasEstimate)
dataContract.notes: Gas quote follows real EIP-1559 formula: nativeFee = gasUnits × (baseFeeGwei + priorityFeeGwei) × 1e-9; usdFee = nativeFee × nativeUsd. gasUnits fixed per op (NATIVE_TRANSFER 21k, ERC20_TRANSFER 65k, BRIDGE_LOCK 120k). Three live inputs on production wire-up: baseFeeGwei (updates per block — ~12s Ethereum, ~2s L2, ideal for WS), priorityFeeGwei (wallet-suggested, infrequent), nativeUsd (price feed, seconds). Mock ticks every DEFI_GAS_TICK_MS=5000 ms via hooks/use-gas-estimate.ts with ±8% baseFee jitter and ±0.5% native-price jitter. Bridge routes still on-demand REST.

gaps.notes: YIELD_ROTATION_LENDING §9 DeFi/lending + bridge: Bridge cost + latency modeled in rotation decision
CARRY_BASIS_PERP §6 DeFi/spot + perp (cross chain): Bridge latency breaks LEADER_HEDGE deadline — needs longer max_hedge_delay_ms config + bridge state machine integration

findings.description: 0.6 isLoading not passed to FormWidget — FormWidget supports skeleton via isLoading prop but it was omitted.
0.7 No empty state for null connectedWallet — widget rendered without a connected wallet guard.
0.9 Dead code — duplicate Fastest badge rendered for isFastest && isBestReturn branch, identical to isFastest && !isBestReturn branch.
0.5 Stale known-issue label — MOCK_CHAIN_PORTFOLIOS and getMockPrice were flagged as direct mock imports but already flow through useDeFiData() context.
1.4 Client filter cascade — context filters at org level only; no sub-client cascade implemented for DeFi domain. Marked N/A as DeFi data is org-scoped, not client-scoped.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.deferReason: text-[10px] migrated to text-micro and text-[9px] migrated to text-nano; text-[11px] at :107 remains — no 11px token in scale (nearest are text-nano 9px and text-xs 12px); product decision required for 11px resolution

findings.description: defi-transfer-widget.tsx:185-191 — gas estimates ('0.00025 SOL', '0.008 MATIC', '0.00004 ETH', '0.0012 ETH') were hardcoded inline in JSX ternary.
findings.fix: 2026-04-21 extracted to TRANSFER_GAS_ESTIMATES and TRANSFER_GAS_ESTIMATE_DEFAULT in lib/config/services/defi.config.ts with one row per DEFI_CHAIN. Superseded by model upgrade 2026-04-21 (see next finding): flat per-chain USD replaced with real EIP-1559 gas formula driven by hook + config.

findings.description: Gas estimate was a flat per-chain USD lookup that ignored (a) the real gas formula, (b) differences between native vs ERC-20 transfers, (c) bridge source-chain gas, (d) changing base fee and native-token price.
findings.fix: 2026-04-21 upgraded to the real EIP-1559 model. Added DefiGasOperation union (NATIVE_TRANSFER=21k, ERC20_TRANSFER=65k, BRIDGE_LOCK=120k), CHAIN_GAS_BASELINE (per-chain baseFeeGwei, priorityFeeGwei, nativeSymbol, nativeUsd), and DEFI_GAS_TICK_MS=5000 in lib/config/services/defi.config.ts. New hook hooks/use-gas-estimate.ts exposes useGasEstimate({ chain, operation }) returning a GasQuote with gasUnits, baseFee/priority gwei, nativeFee, usdFee, nativeUsd, asOf. Mock impl ticks every 5s with ±8% baseFee jitter and ±0.5% native-price jitter; widget is agnostic to the data source and will seamlessly switch when backend (gas oracle or WS subscription) is wired. Widget now shows gas in Send mode (NATIVE_TRANSFER vs ERC20_TRANSFER chosen by comparing selected token against chain native symbol) and in Bridge mode (BRIDGE_LOCK on fromChain). Removed dead TRANSFER_GAS_ESTIMATES and TRANSFER_GAS_ESTIMATE_DEFAULT constants.

findings.description: Gas estimate was static (no recurring update). Real gas changes every block; previous mock never refreshed so the number became misleading over a long session.
findings.fix: 2026-04-21 useGasEstimate hook ticks every 5s via setInterval. On production wire-up the tick is replaced with a gas-oracle WS subscription (Blocknative / custom relayer) or a 3–5s REST poll against eth_feeHistory-equivalent endpoints. Widget contract unchanged.

findings.description: Gas data now flows through a hook (useGasEstimate) rather than direct config import — maintains widget-is-data-source-agnostic invariant. Same pattern other L1 data uses (react-query hooks and useDeFiData context).

Bridge-route feature is backend-aligned — verified 2026-04-21 against unified-api-contracts BridgeProtocol enum (NATIVE|STARGATE|ACROSS|HOP|LAYERZERO|SOCKET|LIFI), execution-service SocketBridgeConnector.get_bridge_quotes(), bridge_cost_model.py, and e2e strategy configs defi_cross_chain_sor.yaml / defi_cross_chain_yield_arb.yaml. Public UI-callable endpoint does not yet exist; tracked as BFR-003.

Enum drift vs backend: UI mock getMockBridgeRoutes returns 'CCTP' (not in backend BridgeProtocol enum — backend folds Circle CCTP into NATIVE). coverage.venues previously listed 'WORMHOLE' which is also not in the enum.
findings.fix: 2026-04-21 updated cert coverage.venues to match backend enum (added LAYERZERO/LIFI/NATIVE/SOCKET, dropped WORMHOLE). CCTP kept in UI mock pending backend decision logged in BFR-003 alignment question #1 — either add CCTP to the enum or UI drops it and relies on NATIVE when path is USDC-eligible.

changelog.summary: Gas-estimate model upgraded from flat per-chain USD to real EIP-1559 formula sourced via useGasEstimate hook. Added GasQuote shape, CHAIN_GAS_BASELINE + DEFI_GAS_UNITS config, and mock oracle tick (5s, ±8% baseFee jitter). Send mode distinguishes NATIVE_TRANSFER vs ERC20_TRANSFER; Bridge mode now also shows BRIDGE_LOCK source-chain gas. dataContract updated: channels += 'websocket' (planned), cadence 5s poll → WS on wire-up. L3 check 3.6 note updated. Legacy TRANSFER_GAS_ESTIMATES constants removed. Bridge routes feature verified against backend (BridgeProtocol enum + SocketBridgeConnector + cost model + strategy configs all shipped internally in execution-service and unified-api-contracts) — public endpoint tracked as BFR-003. coverage.venues aligned to backend enum.
